description: preranked GSEA from a DESeq2 table or a gene,score rank file -> results CSV + dotplot
rules: read-only — no inputs are mutated; outputs only under record_store
supply exactly one of DESEQ2 (results CSV indexed by gene) or RNK (gene,score file)
ranking metric prefers the Wald `stat`, else sign(log2FoldChange) * -log10(pvalue)
permutations use a fixed SEED (default 123) for reproducible p-values
FDR filter uses FDR q-val; needs gseapy + network, degrades gracefully when absent/offline
usage: Set DESEQ2 (DESeq2 results CSV, index=genes) OR RNK (two-column gene,score file). Optional: LIBRARIES, ORGANISM (default human), FDR (default 0.05), SEED (default 123), MIN_SIZE (15), MAX_SIZE (500), PERMUTATIONS (1000). Outputs: gsea_results.csv, gsea_significant.csv, gsea_dotplot.png.
limitation: Preranked GSEA only; never runs ORA. Requires a per-gene score (full ranked list) — never threshold first. Requires gseapy installed and network access for library downloads to produce real results.
